product_updates.title: Lovable reportedly in talks to double its valuation to $13.2B
product_updates.content: The $300 million round is expected to be led by Menlo Ventures, Sifted reported.

product_updates.title: Google’s deepfake detector system used to debunk McConnell hoax pic
product_updates.content: Earlier this week, a picture seemed to show Kentucky Senator Mitch McConnell covered in tubes in a hospital bed in a state of extreme distress. It turned out to be an AI-generated fake.

product_updates.title: SpaceXAI releases Grok 4.5, which Elon describes as an ‘Opus-class model’
product_updates.content: Elon Musk's tech company released the newest version of Grok on Wednesday, promising a cheaper, more efficient alternative to other powerful AI models.

product_updates.title: This startup thinks robotics is about to have its ChatGPT moment
product_updates.content: General Intuition is betting millions of hours of video game data can train the foundation models for physical AI, making it easier to build smarter robots with minimal real-world data.

product_updates.title: Google Photos adds a new AI ‘Video Remix’ tool
product_updates.content: The feature can do things like apply cinematic relighting to brighten up a dark clip, swap out a plain background for something fun, or add artistic styles to videos.

product_updates.title: Why this CEO thinks video games make better training data than the internet
product_updates.content: When it comes to achieving artificial general intelligence (AGI), large language models just don’t have what it takes. Models like ChatGPT and Claude are great at text, but they’re less skilled at understanding how things actually move through space and time — an essential skill for producing int…

product_updates.title: Meta wants its AI glasses to seem less creepy. Its AI strategy says otherwise.
product_updates.content: Meta is adding a new safeguard to stop people from secretly recording others with its AI glasses. But the update comes as the company continues to expand how much personal data its AI products collect and use.

product_updates.title: OpenAI releases new voice models for more natural live conversations
product_updates.content: OpenAI says its new voice mode can speak and listen at the same time, a key ability for live translation.

product_updates.title: Prime Intellect raises $130M Series A to help enterprises build their own AI agents
product_updates.content: Founded in 2024, Prime Intellect’s goal is to give organizations capabilities to train their own agentic systems without relying on frontier AI labs.

product_updates.title: These AI startups are growing revenue at faster and faster rates
product_updates.content: There are a lot of fast-growing AI startups, but some are growing even faster, they say.

technical_breakthroughs.title: Google pays $250K for Linux vulnerability allowing guest VM escapes
technical_breakthroughs.content: Both vulnerabilities allow untrusted users to gain root privileges.

technical_breakthroughs.title: Aussie gov't tells volunteers to throw out thousands of functioning test routers
technical_breakthroughs.content: But the devices could "easily be reflashed."

technical_breakthroughs.title: EmTech AI 2026: The Rise of the AI Platform
US rare earths flow to Asia as domestic demand is slow to emerge
technical_breakthroughs.content: Miners backed by Trump admin sell to Japan, South Korea despite push to develop domestic supply chain.

technical_breakthroughs.title: The Download: worms fight pollution, and geoengineering faces reality
technical_breakthroughs.content: This is today’s edition of The Download, our weekday newsletter that provides a daily dose of what’s going on in the world of technology. technical_breakthroughs.title: Hackers can use 9 of the most popular AI tools to assemble massive botnets
technical_breakthroughs.content: "HalluSquatting" weaponizes LLMs' inability to say "I don't know."
